name: Backrooms: The Silence
short_description: Backrooms: The Silence is a cooperative horror game for 1-4 players, where you have to explore and fight the game master on your own, use your own abilities to survive in this complex world, play with your friends to get the full range of emotions!
detailed_description:
Backrooms: The Silence is a cooperative horror game for 1-4 players, where you have to explore and fight the game master on your own, use your own abilities to survive in this complex world, play with your friends to get the full range of emotions!

  • The game is very difficult

  • One life

  • No manual

  • Proximity voice chat

  • Stealth

  • Immersive AI

Caution

This game is unique compared to many others that focus on the backrooms concept. It sets itself apart by not simply copying everything detailed within the community. Instead, it carefully integrates specific elements of the backrooms, providing a distinct perspective rather than mirroring the entire concept.

supported_languages:
English*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Polish*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Russian*, Ukrainian*, Swedish*
*languages with full audio support
